# AudioHardwarePropertyID | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Audio ](/documentation/coreaudio)

-  AudioHardwarePropertyID 

Type Alias# AudioHardwarePropertyID

Mac CatalystmacOS

```
typealias AudioHardwarePropertyID = AudioObjectPropertySelector
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coreaudio/audiohardwarepropertyid#discussion)

An AudioHardwarePropertyID is a integer that identifies a specific piece of information about the AudioSystemObject.
